---
name: design-architecture
description: Translate intent and design docs into coherent system architecture, interfaces, and implementation boundaries.
---

## Purpose
Keep design, architecture, and implementation boundaries coherent.

## When to use
- When updating or reviewing design files.
- When translating design into implementation structure.
- When deciding ownership between components or artifacts.

## Do
1. Keep the layer boundaries clear.
2. Align design docs with the intended runtime structure.
3. Define interfaces and contracts before implementation.
4. Prefer reusable structure over one-off design choices.
